ships.name: Modified Shield Beetle
ships.description: This ship has been modified by the Unfettered Hai, after that they succesfully invaded Wanderer space. Their primary intention was to increase the weapon space to install more Ion Cannons, but since they were unable to do much they focused on the Solifuge development and, after it was completed, they tried to increase the other attributes instead with good results at the cost of manuevrability and heat control.

ships.name: Swan
ships.description: Compared to the other freighter used by the Remnant the Swan is an old and outdated design: developed at the same time as the agile Starling, but without any integrated cloaking technology. Its main purpose is hauling large quantities of goods between planets, where, if needed, it can land to repair the hull or use its firepower to join the defense fleets.

ships.name: Robin
ships.description: Since the beginning of the renewed safety of the contacts with the Void Sprites, the Remnant have tried to improve the Gascraft's basic design. The Robin has better capabilities than its predecessor, but still lacks the armament to be of any use during a fight.

ships.name: Far Ek Tek 243
ships.description: After they started producing automated drones, the Korath Exiles decided to adapt them for their needs. The Far Ek Tek 243 is a  spaceship that can raid the nearby species, but that doesn't require any crew to operate.

ships.name: Korath Courier
ships.description: During the first stages of their civil war, the Korath developed this autonomous freighter as the backbone of their deliveries across their space. Today, hundreds of years after the end of the war that nearly brought their species to an extinction, most of the remaining Couriers are being used by the Korath Efret together with their World-Ships.

ships.name: Korath Shipper
ships.description: The Shipper is a vessel of old design, used by the Korath mainly for exploration and to transport small groups of people. Only a small number of Shippers is still produced, and even fewer are being actively used as transport.

ships.name: Sea Scorpion
ships.description: Most of the ships the Unfettered had back when they splitted from the rest of the Hai weren't usable as missile boats, and for a while they had to rely heavily on pulse weapons instead. Only after some decades of hard work they were able to take the Sea Scorpion into mass production, but it was worth it: its low price and high number of gun ports make it perfect for its role, at the cost of a weak hull and shielding.

variants.name: Swan (Sniper)
variants.description: Compared to the other freighter used by the Remnant the Swan is an old and outdated design: developed at the same time as the agile Starling, but without any integrated cloaking technology. Its main purpose is hauling large quantities of goods between planets, where, if needed, it can land to repair the hull or use its firepower to join the defense fleets.

Its main purpose is hauling large quantities of goods between planets, where, if needed, it can land to repair the hull or use its firepower to join the defense fleets.

variants.name: Far Ek Tek 243 (Ember, Mereti)
variants.description: After they started producing automated drones, the Korath Exiles decided to adapt them for their needs. The Far Ek Tek 243 is a  spaceship that can raid the nearby species, but that doesn't require any crew to operate.

variants.name: Korath Courier (Empty)
variants.description: During the first stages of their civil war, the Korath developed this autonomous freighter as the backbone of their deliveries across their space. Today, hundreds of years after the end of the war that nearly brought their species to an extinction, most of the remaining Couriers are being used by the Korath Efret together with their World-Ships.

outfits.name: Hai Squall Cooling
outfits.description: With the escalation of their war against the Wanderers, the Unfettered understood that the Sunbeams were causing them problems partly due to the heat their ships were subject to. The Squall cooling system was their answer, larger than their previus coolings but also much more efficent.

outfits.name: Hai Zephyr Cooling
outfits.description: After the introduction of the Ionic Blaster and the consequential need of more reactors to power them, the Williwaw cooling wasn't anymore always enough. They developed this cooling outfit to avoid overheating when they want to use many Ionic Blasters at once.

outfits.name: "Babreii" Afterburner
outfits.description: Considered nothing more than a relic from the past among many Hai, this afterburner is one of their most ancient designs and that has received very small modifications in the last centuries. Only a small part of the Hai still use them.

outfits.name: Ionic Rifle
outfits.description: After the end of the Korath raids, most of the Hai stopped designing new weapons, included those intended to harm other Hai. The Unfettered instead projected this new rifle, with the capacity of shooting ionized shots in fast succession with a higher charge than the ones fired by the older Pulse Rifle.

outfits.name: Protection Station
outfits.description: This special barrier was first built just after the Raiders started attacking the Hai, but they never became popular because back then it was just a way to slow down the enemy boarders. Later on a Pulse Rifle was added to the base model making it much more useful, but they never gained success since the outfit space they take, even if it's not much, prevents a pilot from installing a large number on a ship without removing some components.

outfits.name: Heavy Laser Rifle
outfits.description: The Heavy Laser Rifle is a recent invention of Kraz Cybernetics, an upgrade from the outdated weapon so common on many ships. While it is substantially better in than its base model, the cost is also much higher due to the materials used in its construction.

outfits.name: Professional Security Station
outfits.description: This defensive barrier is based on the original Security Station, but is much more recent. It has two blast doors in case the boarders can blow up one and features a turret connected to a computer placed on the other side of the barricade, where a crew member can safely control it.

outfits.name: RT-II Radiothermal
outfits.description: A few hundreds of years ago, the northern anarchists didn't have access to any heavy generator except the RTI-I model, but with the increase of the ship systems power need they were starting to suffer of low energy more and more often. Their situation got better when one of the few manufacturers on their worlds developed a larger and more space efficent version, but they soon found out it creates more heat than the previus model.

outfits.name: Wanderer Large Heat Sink
outfits.description: When they started producing reactors so large that a simple Heat Sink wasn't enough anymore, the Wanderers understood that a new cooling system was necessary. The result is better than its predecessor, but it's still quite inefficent.

outfits.name: Wanderer Heavy Anti-Missile
outfits.description: This anti-missile system is more powerful and a bit faster than the previous version, while also requiring more energy and creating more heat.

outfits.name: Fuel Centrifuge
outfits.description: Long ago, when a captain could refuel only on a handful, distant systems, running out of fuel was a serious risk: in addition to ramscoops, large fuel centrifuges were installed in most ships. They are able to contain hyperspace fuel in a few pods, but in the process that makes it possible it also becomes less stable and to avoid starting dangerous reactions the containers need to keep rotating at a very high speed. All of this requires energy, and creates a considerable amount of heat.

outfits.name: Accurate Gatling Blaster
outfits.description: Many decades ago, Kraz Cybernetics started a project to upgrade the ancient Gatling Gun design with newer designing technics. While they actually could increase its accuracy and make it maintain substained fire for a longer time, their weapon, the so-called Accurate Gatling Blaster, also requires more energy and more time to completely cool down, not to mention the higher cost and the bullets capacity reduced to little more than half.

outfits.name: Ionic Blaster
outfits.description: Since the Unfettered started their perennial war against the rest of the Hai, they tried to determinate which weapon they should produce the most. They preferred to focus on the Ion Cannon, but the largest downside was its huge size; because of that, it was impossible to mount many of them on a Shield Beetle. After dozens of years of research, a team finally developed a less bulky version, small enough to be installed in large numbers and more focused on normal damage to be also effective once the target's power sources became ineffective.

outfits.name: Ionic Turret
outfits.description: This is a dual turret version of the Ionic Blaster, the first weapon that the Unfetttered developed completely on their own.
